• Procedural mining world with dynamic lighting, day/night cycle, and heat mechanics.
  • Comprehensive UI: touch controls, inventory, shop, admin panel, chat, and customizable HUD gauges.
  • Multiplayer via MQTT with host election, sync, and trade system; optional single‑player mode.
    Game.init();
    Network.connect(isSingleplayer);

This game creates an infinite‑depth mining map, lets players build, mine, trade, and use power‑ups while handling rendering, sound, and multiplayer state. The UI adapts to desktop and mobile, offering modifiable controls and persistent player upgrades.
